title: Wexloth Launcher — First Update!
content: We have pushed several improvements to the launcher: faster downloads, better Java detection, named profile folders, and a folder shortcut on every profile card. Keep the feedback coming!

title: Welcome to Wexloth Launcher!
content: The Wexloth Launcher is here! Enjoy playing Minecraft with all your favorite modpacks. Stay tuned for updates, new custom packs, and more features coming soon.
